title: catalog cannot bind bare-text figure captions for batchelor_fluid
resolution: 已涵蓋於 in-tick repair_catalog_metadata（確定性鄰近 caption 綁定 + captionless/code/diagram exclude）；提案 audit agent 不在其視野故誤報引擎缺口。本書 live crit=0、圖表目錄已收斂。
evidence: smoke stays critical after two extract_rules iterations: H6 unresolved Figure refs=12 and H7 empty_captions=39. Catalog audit shows many figures whose visible id/caption lives in neighboring bare text such as '(b) Figure 1.3.3. ...', 'Figure 5.10.4. ...', or prose-like 'Figure 4.10.1 shows ...', plus multi-image plate shards where only one later block carries the figure id. Enabling figure_caption_merge with a Figure N.N.N. main-caption regex made no change.
proposal: Extend catalog extraction to attach neighboring bare text blocks or sibling image fragments to a figure semantic id/caption, or allow captionless shards to be marked non-indexable without failing H6/H7. Current schema fields cannot express this OCR pattern safely.
